rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §39.039, which prohibits political contributions by assessment contractors. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: A person who is an agent of an entity that has been contracted to develop or implement assessment instruments required under Section 39.023 commits an offense if the person makes or authorizes a political contribution
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns contractor political activity prohibitions, unrelated to homestead exemptions.
